scripts.build: pnpm --filter @aeonkey/core build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/argon2 build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/sqlite build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/webauthn-oslo build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/express build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/example-express build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/example-modules build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @aeonkey/core check && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/core build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/argon2 check && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/argon2 build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/sqlite check && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/sqlite build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/webauthn-oslo check && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/webauthn-oslo build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/express check && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/express build && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/example-express check && pnpm --filter @aeonkey/example-modules check
scripts.pack:packages: pnpm build && mkdir -p artifacts && pnpm -C packages/core pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts && pnpm -C packages/argon2 pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts && pnpm -C packages/sqlite pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts && pnpm -C packages/webauthn-oslo pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts && pnpm -C packages/express pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts
scripts.verify:release: pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm audit && pnpm demo:modules && pnpm run pack:packages
